allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; c = sqlite3.connect\('biotwin.db'\); cur = c.cursor\(\); print\('TABLES:'\); [print\(' -', r[0]\) for r in cur.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\)]; print\('MEALS:', cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM meal'\).fetchone\(\)[0] if cur.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='meal'\\"\).fetchone\(\) else 'none'\); print\('WORKOUTS:', cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM workout'\).fetchone\(\)[0] if cur.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='workout'\\"\).fetchone\(\) else 'none'\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import main; print\('OK - main.py imports cleanly'\)")
PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "killed $p" } else { "no proc" })
